Transcrição Completa: Day 10 - Welcome to Day Number 10

 

[00:00]Welcome to day number 10. Now listen, hopefully you've had some meetings by now.

 

[00:05]If you haven't, you've probably been hearing me talk about these Zoom meetings, which is a tool where you can electronically share information over a screen share.

 

[00:13]You can also use the webcam. You can do it on a mobile desktop. Requires a download of an app right before you do it. But not a big issue, not a uh barrier or an obstacle, if you will.

 

[00:23]Great way to get people in real time interested in things. 35% of people in real life once again are visual learners.

 

[00:31] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Learning Styles Demographics"

 

NÚMEROS: 35% Visual Learners, 40% Kinesthetic, 25% Auditory

 

VISUAL: Breakdown percentual dos estilos de aprendizagem da população mundial, representação gráfica mostrando a distribuição dos três principais tipos de aprendizes

 

[00:35]Meaning if you can get them on a screen share and you can show them things and you have the ability to represent what it is you're talking about, you're going to have the capacity to close people at a faster rate.

 

[00:46]40% of the entire demographic in the world is kinesthetic. Also recently broke down to tactile, which means like the touchy stuff, the senses, whereas kinesthetic is more of the feeling. It's more of the movement of an emotion of some kind.

 

[01:00]So 40% of the world's like that, 35% is visual. 25%'s auditory.

 

[01:05]Technically, you hit all three by being able to show them things that move them and explaining them on a call. You can tap all three and in real time, you can hear people say things like, "I'd like to see more. I'd like to hear more about it. Uh, I need you to explain more about this. I got to go talk to my uh whoever."

 

[01:25] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Real-Time Sales Cues"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados

 

VISUAL: Exemplos de linguagem utilizada por diferentes tipos de aprendizes durante chamadas de vendas, demonstrando como identificar o estilo de aprendizagem do cliente em tempo real

 

[01:28]In real time, you're going to hear people say things like, "I'd love to take action with that, but we've done that before." And it just it put our company in a weird spot. It made us feel bad.

 

[01:38]You know, like they're going to talk about their senses. They're going to use action words of a kinesthetic. You're going to hear them literally be emotional or you're going to hear them use action verbs, right? Things that require movement or emotion or a sense of some kind, right? That's kinesthetic.

 

[01:53]Your ability in real time in a sales presentation like I am right now, you hear the tone of my voice, you hear the speed, you hear how fast I'm moving, you hear these things, control your body. It's like a vehicle.

 

[02:06]Your ability to generate emotion in yourself is your ability to take somebody else to that same emotional state. You feel a little rah when you watch these videos, right? That's because in real time, I'm taking my energy, projecting it into you.

 

[02:19]You have the ability to do the same thing with your clients even through a screen share just like you are right now watching on a screen.

 

[02:26] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Case Study: Real Results"

 

NÚMEROS: $8K/month, 120 days, 23% revenue increase, Inc. 5000 client

 

VISUAL: Estudo de caso específico mostrando resultados concretos de cliente corporativo, trajetória desde fechamento até aquisição por empresa micro cap, demonstração de ROI e crescimento

 

[02:28]Go download some of the presentations. I've taken those I've gotten closed clients that have paid me 8K a month for 120 days that have raised their revenue 23%.

 

[02:39]It was an enormous corporation that was an Inc. 5000 client that then got bought out by a micro cap corporation. That was one of my first clients.

 

[02:48]I had a few other presentations in there for a few automotive people that I never really like to close as they move extremely fast, which I stay away from that industry because of that.

 

[02:58]There's a bunch of stuff in there. Once again, you can go download systems, processes.

 

[03:03]People ask you, uh, can you send me a proposal? Uh, what what happens after like, you know, you do all this? Like, what's the process?

 

[03:11] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Proposal Framework - 4 Step Process"

 

NÚMEROS: 4 fases específicas

 

VISUAL: Framework estruturado de proposta disponível para download, mostrando quatro fases distintas desde criação até entrega de resultados, layout organizado em etapas sequenciais

 

[03:13]Go to the sales script once again and download the emails where it specifically says the proposal link. In the proposal link, it has four different specific steps from the creative phase to the initial phase of communication to everything where you're going to be delivering results to your real-time reporting phase and your real-time change.

 

[03:33]Every single thing step by step in a way where it's specific yet general. You could use that every single time somebody says, "Send me a proposal. Send me the action plan. Send me the steps."

 

[03:44]Use it as an example. Template it out. Change it up.

[03:56]You literally have no excuses. You have so much more than I ever had and I was hitting a lot more than 100 per day.

 

[04:03]You have no excuses. Literally not one. Go hit your 100.

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

35% da população são aprendizes visuais

40% são cinestésicos/táteis

25% são auditivos

$8K/mês por cliente (caso real)

120 dias de contrato

23% de aumento de receita (caso Inc. 5000)

100 chamadas por dia (meta diária)

Dia 10 do programa

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Uso de Zoom meetings para screen sharing e webcam

Atingir os três estilos de aprendizagem simultaneamente em calls

Projeção de energia e emoção para influenciar estado emocional do cliente

Identificação de linguagem específica de cada tipo de aprendiz em tempo real

Download de apresentações e templates comprovados

Framework de proposta em 4 fases estruturadas

Processo desde fase criativa até reporting em tempo real

 

ESTRUTURA:

Framework de Proposta: 4 Fases

Fase Criativa

Fase Inicial de Comunicação

Fase de Entrega de Resultados

Fase de Reporting e Mudanças em Tempo Real

Sistema de emails e scripts de vendas disponíveis para download

Templates customizáveis para diferentes situações de cliente

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Caso de estudo: $8K/mês

Duração contratual: 120 dias

ROI: 23% de aumento de receita

Cliente tipo: Inc. 5000 (grandes corporações)

Resultado: Aquisição por empresa micro cap

 

DURAÇÃO: ~4 minutos FORMATO: Vídeo motivacional/educacional de treinamento de vendas (Dia 10 de programa)
